---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives considered

Are there workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought about?

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, references, or other relevant information.
